title: 403 Error when requesting n8n community license
symptom: When attempting to register for a community license, the user receives a 'Request failed with status code 403' error.
root_cause: The 403 error indicates that the request to register the community edition is forbidden, likely due to the use of HTTP instead of HTTPS. n8n requires a secure connection for license registration to ensure data integrity and security.
fix_steps: Start n8n in tunnel mode using the command 'npx n8n start --tunnel'
Attempt to register for the community license again
agent_instruction: Start n8n in tunnel mode to successfully register for the community license.
